meaning: 帕特森[美国新泽西州东北部城市]
examples: In 1910, she would marry Kenneth Birrell Paterson.
Paterson will become the state's first African-American leader.
David Paterson, his affable successor, was a breath of fresh air.
Deckhand Bruce Paterson said they were resting, or as close to sleep as whales get.
Paterson, who is legally blind, will serve out Spitzer's term, which ends on Dec. 31, 2010.
